description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) Train Service Enhancement
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加強列車服務

2024-05-17T19:26:00.CONTENT_EN: 12 pairs of High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) daily trains travelling between Hong Kong West Kowloon and Futian Stations will be added on 19 and 26 May to cater the travel demand. Tickets for the additional trains are available for sale starting today. All additional trains will be included in the Same-day Flexi-trip Arrangement for passengers to choose for changing their train trips. For the relevant train schedules, please refer to the High Speed Rail website or mobile app.
2024-05-17T19:26:00.CONTENT_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)將於5月19日及26日，每日增加12對來往香港西九龍站及福田站的列車班次，以配合出行需求。 新增列車車票即日起發售。所有新增班次適用於「靈活行」即日變更車次安排，可供乘客選擇改乘。 有關列車服務詳情，請瀏覽高速鐵路網站或手機應用程式。

2024-05-17T19:55:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Wong Nai Chung Road (Aberdeen bound) near Sports Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

2024-05-18T06:25:00.CONTENT_EN: There is an additional travelling time of 10 to 15 minutes on the Island Line between Kennedy Town and Chai Wan because of a signalling fault at Admiralty Station.
2024-05-18T06:25:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於金鐘站信號故障，港島綫來往堅尼地城至柴灣的車程延長10至15分鐘。

2024-05-18T06:32:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that extra travelling time can be expected on the Island Line. 
Please allow more time for travel.
2024-05-18T06:32:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，港島綫列車預計需要額外行車時間，
請為行程預留充裕時間。

2024-05-18T06:40:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to a signalling fault near Admiralty Station, Island Line trains will operate at a slower speed between Central Station and Wan Chai Station. This could extend the total journey time on the Island Line between Kennedy Town Station and Chai Wan Station by 10-15 minutes.
2024-05-18T06:40:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於金鐘站附近有信號故障，港島綫列車駛經中環站和灣仔站路段時需要慢駛，港島綫來往堅尼地城站及柴灣站的行車時間預計需要額外10-15分鐘。

2024-05-18T07:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The signalling fault near Admiralty Station on the Island Line has been repaired. Train operations can now be safely resumed. Normal train service is gradually resuming.
2024-05-18T07:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 金鐘站附近的信號故障已完成復修。港島綫列車服務逐步回復正常。

2024-05-18T10:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Light Rail service disruption due to an incident on an Light Rail Vehicle near Chung Uk Tsuen Stop. Light Rail service diversion: Route 610, Route 614, Route 615 and Route 751 both directions are diverted and will not stop between Lam Tei and Hung Shui Kiu stops. Free MTR shuttle bus service is running between Hung Tin Road Emergency Platform and Siu Hong to carry affected passengers. Please also consider using other transport.
2024-05-18T10:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於鍾屋村站附近輕鐵發生事故，輕鐵服務受阻。 輕鐵路綫改道如下： 610綫，614綫，615綫及751綫改道，將不停藍地站至洪水橋站。 港鐵已安排免費接駁巴士，行走來往洪天路緊急月台至兆康，接載受影響車站的乘客。 乘客亦請考慮改搭其他交通工具。

2024-05-18T12:43:00.CONTENT_EN: The incident on an Light Rail Vehicle near Chung Uk Tsuen Stop has been handled. Light Rail service is gradually resuming.

description.LOCATION_CN: 港珠澳大橋香港連接路

2024-05-20T12:08:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR, with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 80 km/h.
2024-05-20T12:08:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路的最高車速限制由每小時100 公里降低至每小時80 公里。

2024-05-20T12:44:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) near Lion Rock Tunnel Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-20T12:44:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，龍翔道(往荃灣方向)近獅子山隧道公路的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-20T13:07:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) near Lion Rock Tunnel Road which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-05-20T13:07:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的龍翔道(往荃灣方向)近獅子山隧道公路的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-05-20T13:34:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Lion Rock Tunnel Road (Kowloon bound) near Union Hospital which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-05-20T13:34:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的獅子山隧道公路(往九龍方向)近仁安醫院的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-05-20T13:55:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Yuen Long Highway (Tuen Mun bound) near Shap Pat Heung Interchange is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-20T13:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，元朗公路(往屯門方向)近十八鄉交匯處的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-20T14:12:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Yuen Long Highway (Tuen Mun bound) near Shap Pat Heung Interchange which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-05-20T14:12:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的元朗公路(往屯門方向)近十八鄉交匯處的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-05-20T14:48:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Gloucester Road (Cross Harbour Tunnel bound) near SPCA is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-20T14:48:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，告士打道(往海底隧道方向)近愛護動物協會的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-20T15:54:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Gloucester Road (Cross Harbour Tunnel bound) near SPCA which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-05-20T15:54:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的告士打道(往海底隧道方向)近愛護動物協會的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-05-20T15:03:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Tuen Mun bound) near Sea Crest Villa which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-05-20T15:03:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而封閉的屯門公路(往屯門方向)近浪翠園的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-05-20T15:31:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , the slow lane of Tuen Mun Road (Yuen Long bound) near Sea Crest Villa is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-20T15:31:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛故障，屯門公路(往元朗方向)近浪翠園的慢線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-20T16:14:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Wai Yip Street (Yau Tong bound) near Tsun Yip Street is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-20T16:14:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，偉業街(往油塘方向)近駿業街的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。
